overview: StyleBook is a mobile-first PWA scheduling app for hairstylists to manage all their appointments, services, and client history in one place.
features: Day, Week, and Month calendar views with color-coded appointment blocks
Multiphase appointment support for services like Perm and Color
13 pre-seeded services with full edit, duplicate, and delete actions
Client history with search and Quick Rebook feature
Today view with chronological appointment list
Settings for dark mode, start-of-week, and working hours
Mobile-first PWA installable on iPhone and Android
